contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.description: User messages and contact entries submitted through the portfolio contact form

id.description: Unique identifier for the contact entry

name.description: Name or initials of the contact sender

contact.description: The contact info / platform detail of the sender (email, phone, etc)

timestamp.description: Local string representation of the entry datetime

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this record was created

contacts/{contactId}.description: A collection storing contact message submissions
